bugs.error_message: Page goes blank when clicking New Note button. React error: 'The above error occurred in the <NoteEditor> component'
bugs.root_cause: TipTap Table extension requires TableRow, TableHeader, TableCell sub-nodes to be registered separately. They were installed in package.json but not imported or added to the extensions array, causing TipTap to crash during editor initialization.
bugs.fix: Added imports for TableRow, TableHeader, TableCell from their respective @tiptap packages and added them to the extensions array in useEditor.
